requirement_topic.en: New Zealand Market Access, Low-Emission Transport Policy and Responsible Supply Chain
requirement_topic.zh: 新西兰市场准入、低排放交通政策与责任供应链
requirement_topic.zht: 紐西蘭市場准入、低排放交通政策與責任供應鏈

summary.en: New Zealand EV charger market entry combines product safety, electrical installation, importer responsibility, and project procurement requirements. EECA supports low-emission transport and public charging uptake, but policy support does not waive WorkSafe / Energy Safety product obligations, AS/NZS installation requirements, or charge-point-operator specifications. Importers and suppliers should be able to identify the responsible New Zealand party, maintain technical files, support recalls or corrective actions, and ensure installation by licensed electrical workers under New Zealand law.
summary.zh: 新西兰电动汽车充电桩市场准入结合了产品安全、电气安装、进口商责任和项目采购要求。EECA支持低排放交通和公共充电发展，但政策支持并不免除WorkSafe / Energy Safety产品义务、AS/NZS安装要求或充电运营商规范。进口商和供应商应能够明确新西兰责任主体、维护技术文件、支持召回或纠正措施，并确保依据新西兰法律由持证电气工作人员安装。
summary.zht: 紐西蘭電動汽車充電樁市場准入結合了產品安全、電氣安裝、進口商責任和項目採購要求。EECA支持低排放交通和公共充電發展，但政策支持並不免除WorkSafe / Energy Safety產品義務、AS/NZS安裝要求或充電運營商規範。進口商和供應商應能夠明確紐西蘭責任主體、維護技術文件、支持召回或糾正措施，並確保依據紐西蘭法律由持證電氣工作人員安裝。

standards_or_laws: EECA low-emission transport and EV charging programmes
WorkSafe New Zealand / Energy Safety electrical product safety obligations
AS/NZS 3000 and AS/NZS IEC 61851 evidence for the final product and installation

summary.en: China domestic market access is built around GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, GB/T 27930, domestic product certification where in scope, and China charging-network requirements. These documents do not appoint a New Zealand responsible supplier, satisfy New Zealand installation law, or prove acceptance by an EECA-supported project or local charge-point operator.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场准入围绕GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、GB/T 27930、适用时的国内产品认证及中国充电网络要求展开。这些文件不能指定新西兰责任供应商，不能满足新西兰安装法律，也不能证明被EECA支持项目或当地充电运营商接受。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場准入圍繞GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、GB/T 27930、適用時的國內產品認證及中國充電網絡要求展開。這些文件不能指定紐西蘭責任供應商，不能滿足紐西蘭安裝法律，也不能證明被EECA支持項目或當地充電運營商接受。

standards_or_laws: China domestic product certification where in scope

gap.en: Market-access gap: before shipment, identify the New Zealand importer or responsible supplier, confirm whether RCM / supplier declaration records are needed for the exact product, prepare WorkSafe-ready technical evidence, confirm Type 2 / CCS2 and OCPP requirements with the project owner, and plan licensed installation under the Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010. EECA policy context is a demand signal, not an approval route.
gap.zh: 市场准入差距：出货前应明确新西兰进口商或责任供应商，确认具体产品是否需要RCM / 供应商声明记录，准备可供WorkSafe审查的技术证据，与项目业主确认Type 2 / CCS2及OCPP要求，并按《2010年电气（安全）法规》规划持证安装。EECA政策背景是需求信号，不是批准路径。
gap.zht: 市場准入差距：出貨前應明確紐西蘭進口商或責任供應商，確認具體產品是否需要RCM / 供應商聲明記錄，準備可供WorkSafe審查的技術證據，與項目業主確認Type 2 / CCS2及OCPP要求，並按《2010年電氣（安全）法規》規劃持證安裝。EECA政策背景是需求信號，不是批准路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory plus project-specific — product safety and electrical installation obligations are mandatory; EECA and charge-point-operator requirements depend on the funding, procurement, or network project
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic market access evidence is not New Zealand market access evidence

source.publisher: Energy Efficiency and Conservation Authority (EECA), New Zealand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] New Zealand EV policy supports low-emission transport, but it does not replace product safety, RCM / supplier declaration evidence where applicable, AS/NZS installation work, or operator procurement requirements. Chinese exporters need a New Zealand responsible party, New Zealand-ready technical file, Type 2 / CCS2 hardware, and licensed installation plan.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新西兰电动汽车政策支持低排放交通，但不能替代产品安全、适用时的RCM / 供应商声明证据、AS/NZS安装工作或运营商采购要求。中国出口商需要新西兰责任主体、新西兰适用技术文件、Type 2 / CCS2硬件和持证安装计划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 紐西蘭電動汽車政策支持低排放交通，但不能替代產品安全、適用時的RCM / 供應商聲明證據、AS/NZS安裝工作或運營商採購要求。中國出口商需要紐西蘭責任主體、紐西蘭適用技術文件、Type 2 / CCS2硬體和持證安裝計劃。
